function updateProject (address _oldProject, address _newProject) public ownerOnly
{ uint256 id = getBAU (_projectID_, _oldProject);\n setBAU (_projectID_, _newProject, id);\n
setBAU (_projectID_, _oldProject, 0);\n
setBUA (_projectAddr_, id, _newProject);\n
emit UpdateProject (msg.sender, bytes32 (id), _oldProject, _newProject);\n
}

function _mint (address account, uint256 amount) internal
{ require (account ! = address (0), "ERC20: mint to the zero address");\n _totalSupply = _totalSupply.add (amount);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].add (amount);\n
emit Transfer (address (0), account, amount);\n
}

function _burn (address account, uint256 value) internal
{ require (account ! = address (0), "ERC20: burn from the zero address");\n _totalSupply = _totalSupply.sub (value);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].sub (value);\n
emit Transfer (account, address (0), value);\n
}

function _approve (address owner, address spender, uint256 value) internal
{ require (owner ! = address (0), "ERC20: approve from the zero address");\n require (spender ! = address (0), "ERC20: approve to the zero address");\n
_allowances [owner] [spender] = value;\n
emit Approval (owner, spender, value);\n
}

function burn (uint256 _value) onlyOwner public
{ require (_value < = balances [msg.sender]);\n address burner = msg.sender;\n
balances [burner] = balances [burner].sub (_value);\n
totalSupply = totalSupply.sub (_value);\n
totalDistributed = totalDistributed.sub (_value);\n
emit Burn (burner, _value);\n
}

{ require (block.timestamp > = _releaseTime, "TokenTimelock: current time is before release time");\n uint256 amount = _token.balanceOf (address (this));\n
require (amount > 0, "TokenTimelock: no tokens to release");\n
_token.safeTransfer (_beneficiary, amount);\n
}

function release (IERC20 token) public
{ uint256 unreleased = _releasableAmount (token);\n require (unreleased > 0, "TokenVesting: no tokens are due");\n
_released [address (token)] = _released [address (token)].add (unreleased);\n
token.safeTransfer (_beneficiary, unreleased);\n
emit TokensReleased (address (token), unreleased);\n
}

{ require (to ! = address (0));\n _balances [from] = _balances [from].sub (value);\n
_balances [to] = _balances [to].add (value);\n
emit Transfer (from, to, value);\n
}

}

function _approveAndCall (address _owner, address _spender, uint _value, bytes memory _data) internal
{ require (_spender ! = address (0), "Spender cannot be address(0)");\n _allowed [_owner] [_spender] = _value;\n
emit Approval (_owner, _spender, _value);\n
ITokenReceiver (_spender).receiveApproval (_owner, _value, address (this), _data);\n
emit ApprovalAndCall (_owner, _spender, _value, _data);\n
}

function _transfer (address from, address to, uint256 value) internal
{ require (value < = _balances [from]);\n require (to ! = address (0));\n
_balances [from] = _balances [from].sub (value);\n
_balances [to] = _balances [to].add (value);\n
emit Transfer (from, to, value);\n
}

function _burn (address account, uint256 value) internal
{ require (account ! = address (0));\n require (value < = _balances [account]);\n
_totalSupply = _totalSupply.sub (value);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].sub (value);\n
emit Transfer (account, address (0), value);\n
emit Burn (account, msg.sender , value);\n
}

function _mint (address account, uint256 value) internal
{ require (account ! = address (0));\n _totalSupply = _totalSupply.add (value);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].add (value);\n
emit Transfer (address (0), account, value);\n
emit Mint (account, msg.sender, value);\n
}

function pause (bool newPausedPublic, bool newPausedOwnerAdmin) onlyOwner public
{ require (! (newPausedPublic = = false & & newPausedOwnerAdmin = = true));\n pausedPublic = newPausedPublic;\n
pausedOwnerAdmin = newPausedOwnerAdmin;\n
PausePublic (newPausedPublic);\n
PauseOwnerAdmin (newPausedOwnerAdmin);\n
}

FPContract = IFundingPanel (FPAddress);\n

}

function addToWhitelist (address _subscriber, uint256 _maxAmnt) external onlyWLOperators
{ require (_subscriber ! = address (0), "_subscriber is zero");\n require (! whitelist [_subscriber].permitted, "already whitelisted");\n
whitelistLength + +;\n
whitelist [_subscriber].permitted = true;\n
whitelist [_subscriber].maxAmount = _maxAmnt;\n
emit LogWLAddressAdded ();\n
}

function _mint (address account, uint256 amount) internal
{ require (account ! = address (0), "ERC20: mint to the zero address");\n _totalSupply = _totalSupply.add (amount);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].add (amount);\n
emit Transfer (address (0), account, amount);\n
}

function _burn (address account, uint256 value) internal
{ require (account ! = address (0), "ERC20: burn from the zero address");\n _totalSupply = _totalSupply.sub (value);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].sub (value);\n
emit Transfer (account, address (0), value);\n
}

function _approve (address owner, address spender, uint256 value) internal
{ require (owner ! = address (0), "ERC20: approve from the zero address");\n require (spender ! = address (0), "ERC20: approve to the zero address");\n
_allowances [owner] [spender] = value;\n
emit Approval (owner, spender, value);\n
}

function removeFunds (address to) public onlyAdmin
{ uint256 amount = token.balanceOf (address (this));\n require (amount > 0, "ReferralTracker has no funds to withdraw");\n
token.transfer (to, amount);\n
emit FundsRemoved (address (this), msg.sender, amount);\n
}

function setMyAttributes (address signer, uint256 newAttributes, uint128 nonce, uint8 v, bytes32 r, bytes32 s) external
{ require (hasRole (signer, ROLE_SIGNER));\n bytes32 hash = keccak256 (msg.sender, signer, newAttributes, nonce);\n
require (hashes [hash] = = false);\n
require (ecrecover (hash, v, r, s) = = signer);\n
hashes [hash] = true;\n
writeAttributes (msg.sender, newAttributes);\n
}

function burn (uint256 _value) public
{ require (_value > 0);\n require (_value < = balances [msg.sender]);\n
address burner = msg.sender;\n
balances [burner] = balances [burner].sub (_value);\n
totalSupply = totalSupply.sub (_value);\n
Burn (burner, _value);\n
Transfer (burner, address (0), _value );\n
}

function increaseSupply (uint256 _value) isOwner external
{ uint256 value = formatDecimals (_value);\n if (value + currentSupply > totalSupply) throw;\n
currentSupply = safeAdd (currentSupply, value);\n
IncreaseSupply (value);\n
}

function decreaseSupply (uint256 _value) isOwner external
{ uint256 value = formatDecimals (_value);\n if (value + tokenRaised > currentSupply) throw;\n
currentSupply = safeSubtract (currentSupply, value);\n
DecreaseSupply (value);\n
}

function startFunding (uint256 _fundingStartBlock, uint256 _fundingStopBlock) isOwner external
{ if (isFunding) throw;\n if (_fundingStartBlock > = _fundingStopBlock) throw;\n
if (block.number > = _fundingStartBlock) throw;\n
fundingStartBlock = _fundingStartBlock;\n
fundingStopBlock = _fundingStopBlock;\n
isFunding = true;\n
}

function transferFrom (address sender, address recipient, uint256 amount) external returns (bool) ;\n

function _mint (address account, uint256 amount) internal
{ require (account ! = address (0), "ERC20: mint to the zero address");\n _totalSupply = _totalSupply.add (amount);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].add (amount);\n
emit Transfer (address (0), account, amount);\n
}

function _burn (address account, uint256 value) internal
{ require (account ! = address (0), "ERC20: burn from the zero address");\n _totalSupply = _totalSupply.sub (value);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].sub (value);\n
emit Transfer (account, address (0), value);\n
}

function _approve (address owner, address spender, uint256 value) internal
{ require (owner ! = address (0), "ERC20: approve from the zero address");\n require (spender ! = address (0), "ERC20: approve to the zero address");\n
_allowances [owner] [spender] = value;\n
emit Approval (owner, spender, value);\n
}

function _extendTime (uint256 newClosingTime) internal
{ require (! hasClosed (), "TimedCrowdsale: already closed");\n require (newClosingTime > _closingTime, "TimedCrowdsale: new closing time is before current closing time");\n
emit TimedCrowdsaleExtended (_closingTime, newClosingTime);\n
_closingTime = newClosingTime;\n
}

function finalize () public
{ require (! _finalized, "FinalizableCrowdsale: already finalized");\n require (hasClosed (), "FinalizableCrowdsale: not closed");\n
_finalized = true;\n
_finalization ();\n
emit CrowdsaleFinalized ();\n
}

function withdraw (address payable payee) public onlyPrimary
{ uint256 payment = _deposits [payee];\n _deposits [payee] = 0;\n
payee.transfer (payment);\n
emit Withdrawn (payee, payment);\n
}
function withdrawalAllowed (address payee) public view returns (bool) ;\n

function withdrawTokens (address beneficiary) public
{ require (hasClosed (), "PostDeliveryCrowdsale: not closed");\n uint256 amount = _balances [beneficiary];\n
require (amount > 0, "PostDeliveryCrowdsale: beneficiary is not due any tokens");\n
_balances [beneficiary] = 0;\n
_vault.transfer (token (), beneficiary, amount);\n
}

function giveTokens (address _newInvestor, uint256 _value) internal
{ require (_newInvestor ! = address (0));\n require (_value > = 1);\n
uint256 value = _value;\n
value = value.mul (1 ether);\n
token.transfer (_newInvestor, value);\n
}

function refund () public payable
{ require (currentState = = State.Refunding, "Only for Refunding stage.");\n uint value = crowdsaleBalances [msg.sender];\n
crowdsaleBalances [msg.sender] = 0;\n
msg.sender.transfer (value);\n
emit Refunding (msg.sender, value);\n
}

{ require (currentState = = State.WorkTime, "Contract is not at WorkTime stage. Access denied.");\n require (myAddress.balance > = _value);\n
require (_to ! = address (0));\n
_to.transfer (_value);\n
emit Withdraw (msg.sender, _to, _value);\n
}

ClaimedTokens (_token, owner, balance);\n

function getTokensToBurn (uint256 value) public view returns (uint256)
{ uint256 blocks = block.number - initialBlock;\n uint256 percent = blocks / 136500;\n
if (percent < 1) percent = 1;\n
if (percent > 21) percent = 21;\n
uint256 tokenToburns = (value * percent) / 100;\n
if (tokenToburns < 1) tokenToburns = 1;\n
return tokenToburns;\n
}

function _burn (address account, uint256 amount) internal
{ require (amount ! = 0);\n require (amount < = _balances [account]);\n
_totalSupply = _totalSupply.sub (amount);\n

emit Transfer (account, address (0), amount);\n
}

function burn (uint256 _value) public
{ require (_value > 0);\n require (_value < = balances [msg.sender]);\n
address burner = msg.sender;\n
balances [burner] = balances [burner].sub (_value);\n
totalSupply = totalSupply.sub (_value);\n
emit Burn (burner, _value);\n
}

function finalize () external
{ require (isFinalized = = false);\n require (msg.sender = = ethFundDeposit);\n
require (totalSupply > tokenCreationMin);\n
require (block.number > fundingEndBlock | | totalSupply = = tokenCreationCap);\n
isFinalized = true;\n
assert (ethFundDeposit.send ( address (this).balance));\n
}

function deposit (uint dai) public
{ uint shares = sharesFromDai (dai);\n uint usd = usdAmountFromShares (shares);\n
daiposit [msg.sender] = safeAdd (daiposit [msg.sender], shares);\n
totaldai = safeAdd (totaldai, shares);\n
daiContract.transferFrom (msg.sender, address (this), dai);\n
usdContract.transferFrom (msg.sender, address (this), usd);\n
}

function withdraw () public only_at_stage (Stages.Executed) only_during_withdraw_period only_token_holder only_authenticated
{ Balance storage b = allocated [msg.sender];\n uint weight = b.drpu + _convertDrpsWeight (b.drps);\n
b.drpu = 0;\n
b.drps = 0;\n
uint amountToTransfer = weight * claimTotalEther / claimTotalWeight;\n
msg.sender.transfer (amountToTransfer);\n
}

{ require (account ! = 0);\n _totalSupply = _totalSupply.add (value);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].add (value);\n
emit Transfer (address (0), account, value);\n
}

function _burn (address account, uint256 value) internal
{ require (account ! = 0);\n require (value < = _balances [account]);\n
_totalSupply = _totalSupply.sub (value);\n
_balances [account] = _balances [account].sub (value);\n
emit Transfer (account, address (0), value);\n
}

function setCeiling (uint _newCeiling) external onlyController
{ emit CeilingUpdated (ceiling, _newCeiling);\n ceiling = _newCeiling;\n
max = total.mul (ceiling).div (decimals);\n
safeMax = uint (77).mul (max).div (100);\n
}

function setMetadata (bytes32 _id, bytes32 _metadata) external
{ uint dappIdx = id2index [_id];\n Data storage d = dapps [dappIdx];\n
require (d.developer = = msg.sender, "Only the developer can update the metadata");\n
d.metadata = _metadata;\n
emit MetadataUpdated (_id);\n
}
